productDisplayName: Reebok Men Reeflex Run White Sports Shoes
description: The reebok Reeflex Run is a versatile running shoe that features ample ventilation and offers lightweight comfort, keeping your feet fresh and comfortable all day. The attractive shoes have a low-profile, minimalist silhouette for low-to-ground feel and added mobility. Plus, they feature the RealFlex outsole which promotes natural movement. Wear them when you want to run or jog or use them as casual wear. Upper Breathable mesh upper for ample ventilation and reduced irritation Low-profile, minimalist silhouette for low-to-ground feel and added mobility Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Mildly padded tongue and lightly-cushioned collar for in-step comfort Mesh tongue for better ventilation Brand name on tongue and logo on sides Midsole PU midsole for added durability, life, cushioning and a firmer ride Fabric lining for increased comfort Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Outsole 3D Ultralite outsole for lightweight support and natural footstrike RealFlex sole design with 76 individual sensors for multi-directional flexibility and optimal foot feel throughout the footstrike shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
